data.title: Microservices Framework
data.description: Spotify's backend is built with a microservices architecture to allow independent deployment and scaling.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes services written in languages like Java, Python, and Node.js, orchestrated using Kubernetes.

data.title: Distributed Systems
data.description: Spotify leverages distributed systems to efficiently handle over 356 million active users worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Implements Cassandra for wide-column data storage, and Apache Kafka for message streaming.

data.title: Load Balancing Infrastructure
data.description: Servers are strategically placed and managed across the globe to maintain high availability and low latency.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates AWS Elastic Load Balancing (ELB) and CloudFront as a CDN.

data.title: RESTful API Design
data.description: Exposes a robust RESTful API for playback control, user management, and data handling.
data.technical_spec: Primarily developed with OpenAPI standards and OAuth 2.0 for authentication.

data.title: Search and Recommendation Engine
data.description: A custom-built engine for content recommendation based on user data and behavior.
data.technical_spec: Powered by Elasticsearch for full-text search and Bigtable for storing user heuristics.
